flow_points: Sri Lanka started strongly, scoring 50 runs for 1 wicket in their Powerplay.
PHKD Mendis anchored Sri Lanka's batting, contributing 27.0% of the team's total.
Sri Lanka finished their innings with a high-scoring surge in the Death Overs (RR 13.6), shifting momentum.
GH Dockrell (2 wickets for 17 runs) and GJ Delany (1 wicket for 24 runs) delivered crucial spells for Ireland.
Ireland's Powerplay yielded 45 runs for 1 wicket, slightly behind Sri Lanka's opening.
M Theekshana delivered a crucial spell, taking 3 wickets for 24 runs, building defensive pressure.
PWH de Silva followed with another impactful spell, securing 3 wickets for 25 runs.
Ireland struggled under extreme chase pressure, leading to a late-innings collapse.
Sri Lanka ultimately won the match by 20 runs.
